summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KisanSetu NEW features - setup screen, profile persistence, location change functionality, and Marathi language label fix. All new features working perfectly. Backend APIs maintain 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Setup screen appears correctly when localStorage has no 'kisanProfile' key
Setup screen language selector shows correct labels - Marathi displays 'म' (not 'अ')
Setup screen has all required components: name input, location dropdown (8 locations), crop selector (8 crops), Get Started button
Get Started button validation working - disabled when name/location empty, enabled when both provided
Form submission successfully transitions to main app with personalized greeting
Profile data persists in localStorage - setup screen skipped on subsequent visits
Header displays dynamic location (e.g., KOLHAPUR, MAHARASHTRA) with dropdown chevron
Location dropdown opens with all 8 locations when clicking header location
Location selection updates header display and saves to localStorage
Location changes persist after page refresh
Selected crop from setup becomes active on main dashboard
Navigation tabs working correctly (Home, Voice, Scan, Market)
Language switching functional in main app
Crop switching working on main dashboard
All dashboard components present and functional
Backend APIs smoke test: 100% success rate (12/12 tests passed)
GET /api/dashboard-data returns complete weather and mandi data
POST /api/advisory returns AI responses in multiple languages
POST /api/scan processes images and returns pest diagnosis
POST /api/yield returns yield estimates with crop/area parameters
